name: Visa Infinite
description: Are you looking for a luxury travel experience and exclusive discounts?
full_text:
Visa Infinite


--- Benefits ---

Are you looking for a luxury travel experience and exclusive discounts?

Banque Misr Visa Infinite card is the perfect solution for you. Enjoy a wide range of exclusive benefits that make every trip an unforgettable experience.

Enjoy amazing discounts:

• 10% off on your stay at Orascom Development El Gouna hotels

• Up to 15% instant discount at a variety of luxury restaurants partnered with Visa.

50% cash back on your London Cab rides, up to a maximum of EGP 800, valid for 5 trips per year.

· Enjoy a complimentary
dessert at Baki Hospitality when you pay with your Banque Misr Visa Infinite
Credit Card .

·

.

Merchant Name | Offer
Bongoyo | 10% discount
Chicha | 10% discount + Complementary dessert
Luma | 10% discount + Complementary dessert
La Plancha | Free entry + 10% discount + Complementary dessert
Brunch & cake | 10% discount
Storia | 10% discount
Grand Theatre | 10% discount
Dancing Goat | 10% discount
Brown Nose | 10% discount
Willows | 10% discount
Coppermelt | 10% discount
Olas | 10% discount
1980 | 10% discount
Meat Moot | 10% discount
Barranco | 10% discount
Park Food Hall | 10% discount
Muse | 10% discount
24 Bar | 10% discount
The Tap | 10% discount
The Brasserie | 10% discount
TheRecroom | 10% discount
Bocca | 10% discount
Nuwa | 10% discount on weekdays only
Ozel | 10% discount on weekdays only
Collard Ticket | 10% discount


--- Exclusive Travel Services ---

• Discounts on bookings: Enjoy 8% discount on your bookings across Booking.com and great discounts on restaurants at airports around the world through the Visa Dine & Travel app.

• VIP Reception: Enjoy a private airport reception experience with YQ service

Why Banque Misr Visa Infinite?

• Unrivalled benefits: Enjoy a luxurious life full of luxury and comfort.

• Flexible payment: Use your card almost anywhere around the world.

• Security and protection: Enjoy the highest standards of security to protect your transactions.

*Unlimited free access to over 1000 lounge key airport lounges worldwide by downloading the Visa airport companion app from the App Store or Play Store. International E-commerce/POS purchases must be made annually after registration to continue enjoying free access.


--- Banking Benefits ---

• Ease and
convenience: Manage your credit card anytime and anywhere through the BM Online
mobile banking application (transaction details - debt payment - bill payment
... etc)

• SMS Service: Enjoy
SMS notifications immediately after every transaction you make with your credit
card as well as a detailed monthly statement showing your card balance and
minimum payment

• Installment
flexibility: Manage your budget, purchases and cash withdrawals over periods of
up to 36 months at competitive interest rates.

• Fast and secure
shopping: Use contactless payment technology for faster and safer shopping.

• International usage:
Enjoy the freedom to use your credit card anywhere in the world just two months
after its issuance.

• Interest-Free
Installments: Take advantage of interest-free installment offers at many
merchants contracted with us for up to 60 months.


--- Rewards
Program ---

• Earn
 8 points per each EGP spent locally and internationally on fine dining ,
 hotels and airlines.
• Earn
 2 points per each EGP spent on your purchases locally.
• Earned
 points can be redeemed through various ways:
• Electronic
 Vouchers: Use your points to generate E-vouchers through BM online
 redeemable at participating merchant outlets.
• Instant
 Redemption: Instantly redeem your points at selected partner merchants
 without need for E-voucher issuance.
• Cashback:
 Convert your points into cash and transfer the value directly to your
 Banque Misr card.
• For
 more information please visit: Banquemisr
 - BM Rewards Club
• To
 be able to manage your points please log into BM online or visit: www.bmrewardsclub.com . Terms
 and conditions applied.

Usage limits | Details
Limit of Online Purchasing Inside Egypt | Within the card credit limits with Maximum 800000 EGP per Month with a limit of 20 times daily
Limit of Online Purchasing Outside Egypt (In case the customer has not informed the bank of the travel) (within the monthly purchase limit outside Egypt) | 200,000EGP Monthly with a limit of 15 times daily
Contactless purchase limit without pin inside Egypt | 600 EGP per transaction with maximum 15 consecutive transaction
Contactless purchase limit without pin outside Egypt | Equivalent to 50 USD per transaction with maximum 15 consecutive Transaction
Local purchase transactions | Within the credit limits of the card
International purchase transactions (In case the customer has informed the bank of the travel) (E-commerce - POS) | 500,000 EGP Monthly
International monthly purchase limit (in case the customer hasn’t informed the bank of the travel) | 200,000EGPmonthly
Local cash withdrawals ( BM ATMs or Other Banks ATMs) | EGP 30000 Daily
P.O.S cash withdrawal from BM Branches | with max.limit 250000
International cash withdrawals (In case the customer has informed the bank of the travel) | 6,000 EGP monthly


--- Credit Limit ---

For secured cards | Starting from EGP 300,000 to EGP3,000,000
For unsecured cards | Starting from EGP 300,000 to EGP 1,500,000


--- Fees and charges ---

Fees and charges | Details
Issuance | EGP8000
Renewal | EGP 8000
Supplementary cards issuance and renewal | EGP1000
Reissuance of a replacement for lost /damaged card | EGP500
Cash withdrawals through BM ATMs and P.O.S and Other Banks’ machines within Egypt | 2% of the amount withdrawn with minimum EGP 15
Inquiry about the available balance via BM ATMs | Free
Inquiry about the available balance via other banks ATMs inside Egypt | EGP 1 per transaction
Inquiry about the available balance via ATMs outside Egypt | EGP 3 per transaction
Interest rate | 4% monthly
Penalty for delay | EGP 75
Exceeding credit limit | EGP 75
Cash withdrawals outside Egypt | 3% of the transaction’s value + EGP 50 per transaction
Commission for transactions outside Egypt (cash withdrawals – purchases) | 3% of the transaction’s value
Disputing on any transaction through (Fax, Email or Call Centre) where it is proven that the customer is not entitled to dispute on such transaction | EGP 50
Printing certified transactions statement starting from the following month | EGP 20
Requesting clearance letter, certificate of indebtedness or to whom it may concern letter | EGP 50
Upgraded credit cards fees | 50% of the issuance fees (first three years)


--- Purchases and Cash Withdrawals Installments ---

In case the customer wishes to pay-on installment for a processed transaction, then the following procedures shall be applied:

*Disclaimer: Fees may apply if the minimum balance threshold is not maintained.

• Cash withdrawal transaction is carried out through credit card according to the card available balance
• During the performance of cash withdrawal transaction BM call center will be contacted in order to request the installment of transaction.
• Early repayment fees of 4% are applied in case the customer has paid the value of his installment.
• Cash withdrawal charges calculated on the customer’s credit card and related to the amount requested to be paid-on installment will be refunded.

Tenor (Months) | Interest Rate on Purchases and Cash Withdrawals:
3 | 2.81%
6 | 2.77%
9 | 2.76%
12 | 2.73%
18 | 2.67%
24 | 2.63%
36 | 2.56%
